error_signature: empty data structure when binding data objects to pin markers
title: Empty data structure when binding to Mapbox pin markers
symptom: When attempting to bind data objects to pin markers on a Mapbox map, the data structure appears empty, leading to no information being displayed.
not_this_if: Data structure is correctly formatted and not empty
root_cause: The binding process may not recognize the data object if it is not structured correctly. In this case, the data object needs to be wrapped in an array for proper binding to occur.
fix_steps: Use the native weweb function createArray() to wrap your data object in an array.
Attempt to bind the newly created array to the pin markers again.
agent_instruction: Wrap your data object in an array using createArray() before binding it to the pin markers.
